'''ân-d-j''' ('''kanadaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:fligger|fligger]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:fligger|fligger]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-d-j
|-
! Lemma
| kanadaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinadaj|thinadaj]] || [[word:jinadaj|jinadaj]] || [[word:shinadaj|shinadaj]] || [[word:kinadaj|kinadaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunadaj|thuthunadaj]] || [[word:jujunadaj|jujunadaj]] || [[word:shushunadaj|shushunadaj]] || [[word:kukunadaj|kukunadaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunadaj|thunadaj]] || [[word:junadaj|junadaj]] || [[word:shunadaj|shunadaj]] || [[word:kunadaj|kunadaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunadaj|thunadaj]] || [[word:junadaj|junadaj]] || [[word:shunadaj|shunadaj]] || [[word:kunadaj|kunadaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenadaj|thenadaj]] || [[word:jenadaj|jenadaj]] || [[word:shenadaj|shenadaj]] || [[word:kenadaj|kenadaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonadaj|thothonadaj]] || [[word:jojonadaj|jojonadaj]] || [[word:shoshonadaj|shoshonadaj]] || [[word:kokonadaj|kokonadaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonadaj|thonadaj]] || [[word:jonadaj|jonadaj]] || [[word:shonadaj|shonadaj]] || [[word:konadaj|konadaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonadaj|thonadaj]] || [[word:jonadaj|jonadaj]] || [[word:shonadaj|shonadaj]] || [[word:konadaj|konadaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnadaj|thĂŠnadaj]] || [[word:jĂŠnadaj|jĂŠnadaj]] || [[word:shĂŠnadaj|shĂŠnadaj]] || [[word:kĂŠnadaj|kĂŠnadaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanadaj|thathanadaj]] || [[word:jajanadaj|jajanadaj]] || [[word:shashanadaj|shashanadaj]] || [[word:kakanadaj|kakanadaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanadaj|thanadaj]] || [[word:janadaj|janadaj]] || [[word:shanadaj|shanadaj]] || [[word:kanadaj|kanadaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanadaj|thanadaj]] || [[word:janadaj|janadaj]] || [[word:shanadaj|shanadaj]] || [[word:kanadaj|kanadaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanadaj|shanadaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanadaj|goshanadaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanadaj|gokishanadaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanadajnĂŒ|shanadajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanadajnknĂŒ|goshanadajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadajnĂŒ|gokishanadajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanadajshĂ«|shanadajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanadajnkshĂ«|goshanadajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanadajshĂ«|gokishanadajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadajro|shanadajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadajnkro|goshanadajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadajro|gokishanadajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadajmu|shanadajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadajnkmu|goshanadajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadajmu|gokishanadajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanadajsher|shanadajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanadajnksher|goshanadajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanadajsher|gokishanadajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanadajng|shanadajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanadajnkng|goshanadajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanadajng|gokishanadajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanadajya|shanadajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanadajnkya|goshanadajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanadajya|gokishanadajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanadajyam|shanadajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanadajnkyam|goshanadajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanadajyam|gokishanadajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanadajnĂŒshĂ«|shanadajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanadajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshanadajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanadajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishanadajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadajnĂŒro|shanadajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadajnknĂŒro|goshanadajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadajnĂŒro|gokishanadajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadajnĂŒmu|shanadajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadajnknĂŒmu|goshanadajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadajnĂŒmu|gokishanadajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanadajshĂ«nĂŒ|shanadajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanadajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshanadajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishanadajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadajshĂ«ro|shanadajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadajnkshĂ«ro|goshanadajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadajshĂ«ro|gokishanadajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadajshĂ«mu|shanadajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadajnkshĂ«mu|goshanadajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadajshĂ«mu|gokishanadajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanadajronĂŒ|shanadajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanadajnkronĂŒ|goshanadajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadajronĂŒ|gokishanadajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanadajroshĂ«|shanadajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanadajnkroshĂ«|goshanadajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanadajroshĂ«|gokishanadajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanadajromu|shanadajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanadajnkromu|goshanadajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanadajromu|gokishanadajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanadajmunĂŒ|shanadajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanadajnkmunĂŒ|goshanadajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanadajmunĂŒ|gokishanadajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanadajmushĂ«|shanadajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanadajnkmushĂ«|goshanadajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanadajmushĂ«|gokishanadajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanadajmuro|shanadajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanadajnkmuro|goshanadajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanadajmuro|gokishanadajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
